function.arguments:
{"command": "create", "path": "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/verification/scenarios/scenario_swd_debug.yaml", "file_text": "scenario_name: scenario_swd_debug
description: >
  Verifies the 2-pin SWD debug port of mspm33c321a_derivative via the
  Hazard3 Debug Access Port (DAP). Tests cover DAP connection and DPIDR
  read, memory read and write through the DAP while the CPU is running,
  and CPU halt/resume via the debug module.
checklist_ids:
  - DBG-01
  - DBG-02
  - DBG-03
  - DBG-04
test_names:
  - test_dbg_dap_connect
  - test_dbg_mem_read
  - test_dbg_mem_write
  - test_dbg_halt_resume
priority: P0
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

external_devices:
  - name: jtag_probe_model
    type: gpio_stimulus
    connect:
      stimulus_out: swdclk
      bidirectional: swdio
    params:
      swd_clock_div: 8      # SWCLK = 10 MHz (80 MHz / 8)
      idle_cycles: 8
      line_reset_cycles: 50

swd_params:
  swdclk_pad: PAD_SWDCLK
  swdio_pad:  PAD_SWDIO
  expected_dpidr: 0x0BC11477    # Hazard3 DP ID (ARM Debug Port v1)

stimulus:
  - step: 1
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset; CPU begins executing from XIP flash
  - step: 2
    action: swd_line_reset
    device: jtag_probe_model
    description: Drive 50+ SWCLK cycles with SWDIO high for SWD line reset
  - step: 3
    action: swd_jtag_to_swd
    description: Send JTAG-to-SWD switching sequence (0xE79E + line reset)
  - step: 4
    action: swd_read_dp
    register: DPIDR
    description: Read SWD DP IDCODE register
  - step: 5
    action: verify_dpidr
    expected: 0x0BC11477
    description: Confirm DPIDR matches Hazard3 DAP identity
  - step: 6
    action: swd_init_dp
    description: Power-up DP and AP; set CSYSPWRUPREQ and CDBGPWRUPREQ
  - step: 7
    action: swd_select_ap
    ap_index: 0
    description: Select MEM-AP (AP0) for memory access
  - step: 8
    action: fill_sram_via_ahb
    addr: 0x20000100
    data: 0x12345678
    description: CPU writes known value to SRAM via normal AHB path
  - step: 9
    action: swd_mem_read
    addr: 0x20000100
    expected: 0x12345678
    description: Read same SRAM address via SWD DAP MEM-AP; verify data matches
  - step: 10
    action: swd_mem_write
    addr: 0x20000200
    data: 0xDEADC0DE
    description: Write to SRAM via DAP MEM-AP
  - step: 11
    action: ahb_read_check
    addr: 0x20000200
    expected: 0xDEADC0DE
    description: Read same address via normal CPU AHB path; verify write took effect
  - step: 12
    action: swd_halt_cpu
    description: Write DMCONTROL.haltreq=1 via SWD Debug Module; verify halted
  - step: 13
    action: swd_verify_halted
    description: Read DMSTATUS; verify allhalted bit set
  - step: 14
    action: swd_read_gpr
    register: x1
    description: Read GPR x1 via abstract command while CPU is halted
  - step: 15
    action: swd_resume_cpu
    description: Write DMCONTROL.resumereq=1 to resume CPU execution
  - step: 16
    action: swd_verify_running
    description: Read DMSTATUS; verify allrunning bit set after resume

checks:
  - id: CHK-DBG-01
    checklist_id: DBG-01
    description: SWD DPIDR returns 0x0BC11477 (Hazard3 DAP identity)
    expected: DPIDR == 0x0BC11477
  - id: CHK-DBG-02
    checklist_id: DBG-02
    description: DAP MEM-AP reads SRAM address 0x20000100; data matches CPU-written value
    expected: SWD read returns 0x12345678
  - id: CHK-DBG-03
    checklist_id: DBG-03
    description: DAP MEM-AP write to 0x20000200; CPU AHB read returns same value
    expected: AHB read returns 0xDEADC0DE
  - id: CHK-DBG-04
    checklist_id: DBG-04
    description: CPU halts on haltreq; allhalted confirmed; GPR readable; CPU resumes on resumereq
    expected: DMSTATUS.allhalted=1 during halt; DMSTATUS.allrunning=1 after resume

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-DBG checks PASS
  - SWD protocol model reports no framing or parity errors
  - No simulation hang during SWD transactions
"}
function.name: str_replace_editor

args.file_text:
scenario_name: scenario_swd_debug
description: >
  Verifies the 2-pin SWD debug port of mspm33c321a_derivative via the
  Hazard3 Debug Access Port (DAP). Tests cover DAP connection and DPIDR
  read, memory read and write through the DAP while the CPU is running,
  and CPU halt/resume via the debug module.
checklist_ids:
  - DBG-01
  - DBG-02
  - DBG-03
  - DBG-04
test_names:
  - test_dbg_dap_connect
  - test_dbg_mem_read
  - test_dbg_mem_write
  - test_dbg_halt_resume
priority: P0
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

external_devices:
  - name: jtag_probe_model
    type: gpio_stimulus
    connect:
      stimulus_out: swdclk
      bidirectional: swdio
    params:
      swd_clock_div: 8      # SWCLK = 10 MHz (80 MHz / 8)
      idle_cycles: 8
      line_reset_cycles: 50

swd_params:
  swdclk_pad: PAD_SWDCLK
  swdio_pad:  PAD_SWDIO
  expected_dpidr: 0x0BC11477    # Hazard3 DP ID (ARM Debug Port v1)

stimulus:
  - step: 1
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset; CPU begins executing from XIP flash
  - step: 2
    action: swd_line_reset
    device: jtag_probe_model
    description: Drive 50+ SWCLK cycles with SWDIO high for SWD line reset
  - step: 3
    action: swd_jtag_to_swd
    description: Send JTAG-to-SWD switching sequence (0xE79E + line reset)
  - step: 4
    action: swd_read_dp
    register: DPIDR
    description: Read SWD DP IDCODE register
  - step: 5
    action: verify_dpidr
    expected: 0x0BC11477
    description: Confirm DPIDR matches Hazard3 DAP identity
  - step: 6
    action: swd_init_dp
    description: Power-up DP and AP; set CSYSPWRUPREQ and CDBGPWRUPREQ
  - step: 7
    action: swd_select_ap
    ap_index: 0
    description: Select MEM-AP (AP0) for memory access
  - step: 8
    action: fill_sram_via_ahb
    addr: 0x20000100
    data: 0x12345678
    description: CPU writes known value to SRAM via normal AHB path
  - step: 9
    action: swd_mem_read
    addr: 0x20000100
    expected: 0x12345678
    description: Read same SRAM address via SWD DAP MEM-AP; verify data matches
  - step: 10
    action: swd_mem_write
    addr: 0x20000200
    data: 0xDEADC0DE
    description: Write to SRAM via DAP MEM-AP
  - step: 11
    action: ahb_read_check
    addr: 0x20000200
    expected: 0xDEADC0DE
    description: Read same address via normal CPU AHB path; verify write took effect
  - step: 12
    action: swd_halt_cpu
    description: Write DMCONTROL.haltreq=1 via SWD Debug Module; verify halted
  - step: 13
    action: swd_verify_halted
    description: Read DMSTATUS; verify allhalted bit set
  - step: 14
    action: swd_read_gpr
    register: x1
    description: Read GPR x1 via abstract command while CPU is halted
  - step: 15
    action: swd_resume_cpu
    description: Write DMCONTROL.resumereq=1 to resume CPU execution
  - step: 16
    action: swd_verify_running
    description: Read DMSTATUS; verify allrunning bit set after resume

checks:
  - id: CHK-DBG-01
    checklist_id: DBG-01
    description: SWD DPIDR returns 0x0BC11477 (Hazard3 DAP identity)
    expected: DPIDR == 0x0BC11477
  - id: CHK-DBG-02
    checklist_id: DBG-02
    description: DAP MEM-AP reads SRAM address 0x20000100; data matches CPU-written value
    expected: SWD read returns 0x12345678
  - id: CHK-DBG-03
    checklist_id: DBG-03
    description: DAP MEM-AP write to 0x20000200; CPU AHB read returns same value
    expected: AHB read returns 0xDEADC0DE
  - id: CHK-DBG-04
    checklist_id: DBG-04
    description: CPU halts on haltreq; allhalted confirmed; GPR readable; CPU resumes on resumereq
    expected: DMSTATUS.allhalted=1 during halt; DMSTATUS.allrunning=1 after resume

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-DBG checks PASS
  - SWD protocol model reports no framing or parity errors
  - No simulation hang during SWD transactions
